mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, path, component, permission, icon, sort_order, status, create_time FROM sys_menu ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.path, m.component, m.permission, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.status FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 0 AND m.menu_type IN (0, 1) ORDER BY m.sort_order

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 0 AND m.permission != ''
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, path, component, permission, icon, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{menuType}, #{path}, #{component}, #{permission}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
